entities.name: Third Brain
entities.context: Zo-like system that handles semantic recall and relevance determination - knows what to surface when and why

entities.name: First Brain
entities.context: Biological mind - the natural human cognitive system

entities.name: Second Brain
entities.context: Storage systems like Notion and PKM tools for external knowledge capture

entities.name: Zo
entities.context: Referenced as exemplar of Third Brain architecture

entities.name: Notion
entities.context: Example of Second Brain storage system

entities.name: PKM tools
entities.context: Personal Knowledge Management tools - category of Second Brain systems

relationships.context: Zo is the instantiation/example of Third Brain concept
Notion is an example storage system for Second Brain
PKM tools are the category of Second Brain systems
Sequential progression in V's brain hierarchy model
Third Brain builds on Second Brain by adding semantic intelligence
